user_prompt: Critical: mind-impulse unit requires an activation
prayer:

user_prompt: Offer prayer for cyber-mastiff a reset
prayer:
Present thyself before the cyber-mastiff and intone the Rite of Reset to purge digital corruptions.
Circumambulate the cyber-mastiff thrice, anointing its sensor arrays with blessed lubricants.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the cyber-mastiff to accept the reset, banishing errant code-daemons.
Execute the reset sequence under the Omnissiah's gaze, verifying purity in its logic cores.
Conclude with vows of loyalty, ensuring the cyber-mastiff's servile devotion endures.

Invoke the Omnissiah to bless the sicarian infiltrator's renewal, purging thermal residues.
Affirm full charging through auspex scans and laudatory binaric hymns.
